deck.name: AVGE Showcase Sticker
deck.effect: If attached character is active at the start of your turn, flip a coin. If heads, draw 1 extra card.

ability.name: Get Served
ability.description: While this character is in play, none of your opponent’s characters can have more than 3 energy attached to them at once. If they do before this card is active, they must discard the excess energy from each.

moves.name: Embouchure
moves.effect: Move your energy among your characters any way you would like.

deck.name: Will
deck.effect: Arrangement: Shuffle all items, tools, and supporters from your discard pile into your deck.

deck.name: Concert Roster
deck.effect: Search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench.

deck.name: Printed Score
deck.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand.

deck.name: Michelle
deck.effect: Discord Announcement: Opponent discards down to 2 cards in hand.

deck.name: Concert Ticket
deck.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

deck.name: BAI Email
deck.effect: Discard any stadium in play. Your opponent cannot play a new stadium on their next turn.

moves.name: Fanfare
moves.effect: Not affected by weakness, resistance, or immunities.

moves.name: Cherry Flavored Valve Oil
moves.effect: Deal 40 damage. Heal one benched character of your choice for the same amount of damage this attack actually dealt.

ability.name: Procrastinate
ability.description: If this character did not attack during the previous turn, do +30 damage. Does not stack.

deck.name: Concert Program
deck.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck.

ability.name: Baking Buff
ability.description: While on your bench, if your active character is a Brass type, they deal +20 damage per attack.

moves.name: Concert Pitch
moves.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Brass character on your bench.

hand.name: Main Hall
hand.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.
hand.description: Small Ensemble Limit: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

hand.name: Ice Skates
hand.effect: Switch your active character with one of your benched characters.

hand.name: Lindemann Big Practice Room
hand.effect: If all of your benched characters share a type with your active character, your attacks take 1 less energy.
hand.description: Sectionals: If all of your benched characters share a type with your active character, your attacks take 1 less energy.

hand.name: Steinert Basement Studio
hand.effect: If you have exactly two character cards in play at the start of your turn, draw two cards instead of one. Each attack costs 1 additional energy.
hand.description: Duo Queue: If you have exactly two character cards in play at the start of your turn, draw two cards instead of one. 15 Minute Walk: Each attack costs 1 additional energy.

discard.name: AVGE T-Shirt
discard.effect: Volunteer: Grants Goon status while attached.

discard.name: Corrupted Musescore File
discard.effect: You can only play this if your active character is an Arranger. Draw two cards from the bottom of your deck.

discard.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
discard.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

ability.name: Delicate Ears
ability.description: If there are no Brass characters in play, this character's attacks do 20 more damage.

moves.name: Four Hands Piano
moves.effect: +30 damage if you have a piano on your bench.

deck.name: Concert Ticket
deck.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

deck.name: Raffle Ticket
deck.effect: Draw a card. If it is an AVGE Birb, heal all damage from one character.

ability.name: Algorithm
ability.description: While Bokai is in play, if your opponent plays a character you already have in play, that character on your opponent's side takes 60 damage.

moves.name: Rimshot
moves.effect: Roll a d6. If you roll a 1-4, do 70 damage.

deck.name: Emma
deck.effect: Toxic Sabotage: Switch your opponent's active character with a benched character of your choice.

deck.name: Concert Program
deck.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck.

deck.name: Steinert Practice Room
deck.effect: Each player may not have more than 2 benched characters. If a player has 3, they discard one (the player who played this stadium discards first). Each attack costs 1 additional energy.
deck.description: Practice Prison: Each player may not have more than 2 benched characters. If a player has 3, they discard one (the player who played this stadium discards first). 15 Minute Walk: Each attack costs 1 additional energy.

deck.name: Concert Roster
deck.effect: Search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench.

deck.name: Michelle
deck.effect: Discord Announcement: Opponent discards down to 2 cards in hand.

moves.name: Stick Trick
moves.effect: 20 damage. You may swap with one of your Benched characters for free.

moves.name: Excused Absence
moves.effect: Heal 30 damage from each of your characters.

deck.name: Red Room
deck.effect: Strings, woodwinds, and brass do −10 damage; choir, guitars, percussion, and pianos do +10 damage.
deck.description: Amp Diff: Strings, woodwinds and brass do −10 damage; choir, guitars, percussion, pianos do +10 damage.

deck.name: Bucket
deck.effect: Anything you want to be: Attached character becomes a Percussion type.

deck.name: Maid Outfit
deck.effect: Forced Recruitment: Attached character gains Maid status while holding this tool.

deck.name: Standard Musescore File
deck.effect: You can only play this if your active character is an Arranger. Draw two cards from the top of your deck.

deck.name: Main Hall
deck.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.
deck.description: Small Ensemble Limit: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

ability.name: Wait no… I'm not into femboys–
ability.description: Cavin does 20 more damage for each maid in play.

hand.name: BAI Email
hand.effect: Discard any stadium in play. Your opponent cannot play a new stadium on their next turn.

hand.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
hand.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

moves.name: Ragebaited
moves.effect: When 50 hp or below, this attack does 30 more damage. When 20 hp or below, 80 more damage.

moves.name: Ominous Chimes
moves.effect: Shuffle this character and all cards attached to it back into your deck. At the end of your opponent's next turn, their Active character takes 70 damage.

moves.name: Rimshot
moves.effect: Roll a d6. If you roll a 1-4, do 70 damage.

moves.name: Stickshot
moves.effect: Roll a d6 four times. Damage is equal to (40 × the lowest number you rolled).

hand.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand.

deck.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck.

ability.name: Baking Buff
ability.description: While on your bench, if your active character is a Brass type, they deal +20 damage per attack.

moves.name: Concert Pitch
moves.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Brass character on your bench.

ability.name: Delicate Ears
ability.description: If there are no Brass characters in play, this character's attacks do 20 more damage.

moves.name: Four Hands Piano
moves.effect: +30 damage if you have a piano on your bench.

hand.name: Main Hall
hand.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.
hand.description: Small Ensemble Limit: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

hand.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
hand.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

hand.name: Ice Skates
hand.effect: Switch your active character with one of your benched characters.

hand.name: Lindemann Big Practice Room
hand.effect: If all of your benched characters share a type with your active character, your attacks take 1 less energy.
hand.description: Sectionals: If all of your benched characters share a type with your active character, your attacks take 1 less energy.

deck.name: Printed Score
deck.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand.

deck.name: Concert Ticket
deck.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

deck.name: Raffle Ticket
deck.effect: Draw a card. If it is an AVGE Birb, heal all damage from one character.

ability.name: Algorithm
ability.description: While Bokai is in play, if your opponent plays a character you already have in play, that character on your opponent's side takes 60 damage.

moves.name: Rimshot
moves.effect: Roll a d6. If you roll a 1-4, do 70 damage.

deck.name: Emma
deck.effect: Toxic Sabotage: Switch your opponent's active character with a benched character of your choice.

deck.name: Concert Program
deck.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck.

deck.name: Steinert Practice Room
deck.effect: Each player may not have more than 2 benched characters. If a player has 3, they discard one (the player who played this stadium discards first). Each attack costs 1 additional energy.
deck.description: Practice Prison: Each player may not have more than 2 benched characters. If a player has 3, they discard one (the player who played this stadium discards first). 15 Minute Walk: Each attack costs 1 additional energy.

deck.name: Concert Roster
deck.effect: Search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench.

deck.name: Michelle
deck.effect: Discord Announcement: Opponent discards down to 2 cards in hand.

moves.name: Stick Trick
moves.effect: 20 damage. You may swap with one of your Benched characters for free.

moves.name: Excused Absence
moves.effect: Heal 30 damage from each of your characters.

deck.name: Red Room
deck.effect: Strings, woodwinds, and brass do −10 damage; choir, guitars, percussion, and pianos do +10 damage.
deck.description: Amp Diff: Strings, woodwinds and brass do −10 damage; choir, guitars, percussion, pianos do +10 damage.

deck.name: Bucket
deck.effect: Anything you want to be: Attached character becomes a Percussion type.

deck.name: Maid Outfit
deck.effect: Forced Recruitment: Attached character gains Maid status while holding this tool.

deck.effect: You can only play this if your active character is an Arranger. Draw two cards from the top of your deck.

deck.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

hand.name: BAI Email
hand.effect: Discard any stadium in play. Your opponent cannot play a new stadium on their next turn.

hand.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
hand.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

moves.name: Ragebaited
moves.effect: When 50 hp or below, this attack does 30 more damage. When 20 hp or below, 80 more damage.

moves.name: Ominous Chimes
moves.effect: Shuffle this character and all cards attached to it back into your deck. At the end of your opponent's next turn, their Active character takes 70 damage.

moves.name: Rimshot
moves.effect: Roll a d6. If you roll a 1-4, do 70 damage.

moves.name: Stickshot
moves.effect: Roll a d6 four times. Damage is equal to (40 × the lowest number you rolled).

deck.effect: If you have exactly two character cards in play at the start of your turn, draw two cards instead of one. Each attack costs 1 additional energy.
